verified.notes: Program guarantees legal service to people age 60 and over 'regardless of income or resources' per official AG source. Income and asset limits are not applicable. Phone number is for East River Legal Services (eastern SD); Dakota Plains Legal Services serves western SD and reservations. Specific income thresholds for general legal aid programs exist but do not apply to the age 60+ program specifically.
